subject: Gligar — a purple bat-scorpion hybrid Pokémon with clawed forearms, a barbed tail, and membrane wings, shown gliding through an outdoor sky
description: A purple creature with bat-like membrane wings stretched wide, clawed forearms, and a distinctive barbed scorpion tail glides through an outdoor setting with blue sky and green terrain visible below. The creature's face shows a wide open gaping expression — part of its recognizable design. The wings are spread in a full glide posture, and the barbed tail curls upward. The setting suggests it is in mid-air over open ground or low terrain.
foreground: Purple bat-scorpion hybrid in full glide with clawed arms and barbed tail
background: Blue sky and green terrain below
